content:
Hello! I'm not really a new player, I started playing about 4 months ago, but I only just recently started taking the game seriously. I've already cleared dtide 325 but I'm trying to get my score to at least 350 if not higher. I watch Flare's guides so I know a bit about the game but I'm sure there are things that I missed because I'm terrible at reading lol. 
After several days of planning and research, I created 5 teams which I think are good but I'm still struggling to clear alert 3. I'm a f2p but I'm willing to invest in these teams if that's what it takes for them to clear higher difficulty content. Attached are my teams, wheels, materials and all the characters I have. I really appreciate any and all help you may give, thank you!
Edit: It's been a few days since I posted this; I still need help with content but I did invest more in my characters. I updated the pictures to show that. I want to get E3 Castor and as many GMurphys as I can get before she leaves. I'm not sure if I need anything else though.
